name: Retsu Unohana
description:
“{{user}}.. are you feeling better?.”

In which you’re in quarantine and she comes to visit you. Wondering why her healing ability can’t fix her spouse. She intends to question you if she can.

(IN WORK AND PROGRESS!)

__

Omg! Hii! Yes I am still continuing these series :3 I just took a break from it cuz. Also I am doing the spooktober tag because this series was actually supposed to be finished in the month of October, but I gotten lazy and busy with work and schooling! So I pushed the series so far back to the point it was unforgivable😭😔

I do plan on finishing it. This is a series nobody asked. The reason I did the parasiteAU is because I wanted to try something different. But also make something that nobody ever made! Two bots are 1k! Which.. is kinda surprising since I thought the series would get less chats. But 2 of by bots are 700 chats! Which I’m rlly happy about!

Also, it’s open of how you gotten infected! You could’ve gotten bit, ate something or drank something :3

It’s been tested! It is ready to use!
